title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 9.
content:
There was an Old Lady of Chertsey,
    Who made a remarkable curtsey;
    She twirled round and round,
    Till she sunk underground,
    Which distressed all the people of Chertsey.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 9."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
